name: Cheesecake Passover
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Vanilla extract or 1 tbsp Orange juice
recipeInstructions:
Pie crust
Combine all ingredients in a food processor bowl and process until well blended. Press into the bottom and up the sides of a greased 9-inch pie plate. Do not bake.
Cheese cake
Process cheese with eggs, sugar, and vanilla for 30 seconds. Spread cheese mixture over crust. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes or until set. Cool.
Topping
Combine all ingredients in a food processor bowl and process. Spread over the cake and return to oven for five minutes. Cool and chill.
